scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const hasTs=fs.existsSync('src')&&fs.readdirSync('src',{recursive:true}).some((entry)=>/\.(cts|mts|ts)$/.test(entry)); if(!hasTs){console.log('Skipping shared build: no source files yet.'); process.exit(0);} const result=spawnSync('tsc',['-p','tsconfig.json'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const hasTs=fs.existsSync('src')&&fs.readdirSync('src',{recursive:true}).some((entry)=>/\.(cts|mts|ts)$/.test(entry)); if(!hasTs){console.log('Skipping shared lint: no source files yet.'); process.exit(0);} const result=spawnSync('tsc',['-p','tsconfig.json','--noEmit'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const hasTs=fs.existsSync('src')&&fs.readdirSync('src',{recursive:true}).some((entry)=>/\.(cts|mts|ts)$/.test(entry)); if(!hasTs){console.log('Skipping shared typecheck: no source files yet.'); process.exit(0);} const result=spawnSync('tsc',['-p','tsconfig.json','--noEmit'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
